name: @chiselgrid/sharepoint-webpart
description: ChiselGrid SPFx Web Part — renders tenant content in SharePoint via iframe with SSO

scripts.build: echo 'Build via Docker: docker run -v $(pwd):/app spfx-builder gulp bundle --ship && gulp package-solution --ship'
scripts.serve: echo 'Serve via Docker: docker run -v $(pwd):/app -p 4321:4321 spfx-builder gulp serve'
